children.name:
Error: Either /sitemap.xml or a robots Sitemap: directive required

expect(received).toMatch(expected)

Expected pattern: /sitemap:/i
Received string:  "User-Agent: *
Allow: /·
"
@regression /sitemap.xml exists or is referenced by robots

Error: Unexpected JS errors: /auth.prod.brya.com/api/session due to access control checks.; /auth.prod.brya.com/api/session due to access control checks.

expect(received).toEqual(expected) // deep equality

- Expected  - 1
+ Received  + 4

- Array []
+ Array [
+   "/auth.prod.brya.com/api/session due to access control checks.",
+   "/auth.prod.brya.com/api/session due to access control checks.",
+ ]
@regression no critical JavaScript errors thrown during load
